character_sheet: A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student in Korean manhwa webtoon illustration style — NEVER show face, only back view, hands, silhouette, or cheek/jaw close-up. Simple plain t-shirt, casual pants. Soft cel-shaded 2D clean line art.

scenes.image_prompt: Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic sad atmosphere. A small Vietnamese student apartment at early morning. Pale cold blue-gray light filters through thin curtains. On a wooden desk: two ceramic coffee mugs — one untouched, faintly steaming. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student seen from behind only, simple white t-shirt, standing quietly at the window staring at the empty street below. On the wall above the desk: a paper tear-off calendar with one date circled in red pen. Soft cold blue-gray webtoon palette, gentle gradient shading, 16:9, no face visible, no text in image.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic sad atmosphere. A university thesis defense room in Vietnam. Three professors sit silently behind a long table, a graded evaluation paper placed face-down on the desk. At the far end of the room: a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student seen entirely from behind, simple t-shirt, shoulders curving inward, staring at the face-down paper. The empty space surrounding him feels vast. Cold blue-gray webtoon palette, soft fluorescent light shading, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic sad atmosphere. A long empty university corridor in Vietnam. A single diagonal beam of afternoon sunlight cuts across the cold tiled floor — the only warmth in the scene. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student stands alone in the center of the corridor, seen from behind, looking down at his phone. Blurred silhouettes of other students in groups visible far away in the background. Cold blue-gray webtoon palette with one warm light accent, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. A small Vietnamese student apartment, daytime. A young woman seen from behind sits alone at a small dining table eating slowly. Her boyfriend's untouched meal portion sits beside her going cold. Across the room a gaming monitor glows brightly — the back of a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student hunched at the keyboard, headphones on, completely absorbed. The physical distance between them in the tiny room feels enormous. Neutral muted warm-gray palette, slightly dim webtoon shading, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Small Vietnamese student apartment, 2pm weekday. A bright gaming monitor fills the left foreground — a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student's back visible at the keyboard. In the background near a small mirror: a young woman in a convenience store work uniform adjusting her hair and name tag before her shift, seen from behind. He does not look up. He does not say goodbye. Muted neutral dim webtoon palette, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Vietnamese student apartment doorway. A young woman holds her bag and pauses at the open door, head turned slightly back into the room — a last glance. In the background: a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student still seated at his gaming desk, back to her, not turning around, not noticing. She reaches for the door handle herself. She closes it herself. Muted neutral dim webtoon palette, soft gradient shading, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. Webtoon close-up panel: two hands of a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student holding a smartphone. The phone screen shows a formal email — subject line visible as an internship rejection, body text beginning. Through the window in the soft blurred background: a Vietnamese cityscape at late afternoon, sky shifting from orange to cold gray-blue. Cold desaturated webtoon palette, 16:9, no face visible, no text overlay.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. A small Vietnamese student apartment living area. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student and a young woman sit on opposite ends of a narrow sofa, both seen from behind, each turned slightly away from the other — the deliberate gap between them painful. A small turned-off TV dimly reflects the room. Neither speaks. Neutral muted gray webtoon palette, slightly dim, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Small Vietnamese student apartment, a simple table between two people. A young woman leans slightly forward across the table as she speaks — her open hand placed gently on the table reaching toward the other side. Across from her: a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student sits back, gaze drifting toward the window, not listening. Her hand remains unclaimed on the table. Neutral muted dim webtoon palette, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic sad atmosphere. Outside a Vietnamese university main gate at late afternoon. Groups of students stream past chatting and laughing. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student stands completely still in the middle of the crowd, seen from behind, shoulders slightly slumped, phone at his side — no one looks at him, no one stops. Cold blue-gray desaturated webtoon palette, wide shot, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. A motorbike rearview mirror fills the frame. Reflected in the mirror: a pair of visibly reddened eyes under a motorcycle helmet visor — eyes glistening, holding back tears. Soft bokeh reflection of Ho Chi Minh City dusk traffic behind the rider. Cold blue-gray webtoon tone, dramatic close-up panel, emotional focus on reflected eyes, 16:9, no full face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. Ho Chi Minh City street at dusk, heavy motorbike rush hour. Side view: a lone motorbike carries a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student in a plain helmet — his small figure dwarfed by the surrounding stream of vehicles and buses. Street lights flicker on one by one, warm orange pools in the cold blue-gray evening air. Webtoon wide shot, warm-cold color contrast, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Extreme close-up webtoon panel: the cheek and jaw of a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student inside a motorcycle helmet visor. A single tear traces slowly down his cheek. Background completely bokeh — soft golden smears of city street lights dissolving in cold blue evening. Maximum emotional weight, minimal composition. Cold palette with warm bokeh, 16:9, only cheek jaw and tear visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. A dark narrow apartment hallway at night. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student stands motionless before a closed door, seen from behind — one hand loosely holding his keys, arm at his side, not yet reaching for the lock. Warm golden light leaks in a thin glowing line from under the door and around its frame. He stands suspended between the cold dark hallway and the warm interior light. Cold-warm contrast webtoon composition, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, tense atmosphere. Inside a small Vietnamese student apartment. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student has just stepped through the doorway, seen from behind. In the center of the room a young woman stands with her back half-turned, arms straight at her sides, waiting — posture rigid, prepared. The room feels smaller than usual. Cold blue-gray interior webtoon palette, wide shot, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Inside a small Vietnamese student apartment. Two figures stand face to face at close distance — seen only from the chin downward, no full faces. The young woman's lips part as she speaks. In the lower third of the frame: a clean simple subtitle reads 'Chán anh rồi. Anh không có tương lai.' Cold blue-gray webtoon palette, dramatic emotional close-up panel, 16:9, no full faces, subtitle as visual story element only.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic sad atmosphere. A Vietnamese student apartment bedroom. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student sits on the edge of the bed seen from behind, elbows on his knees, head bowed toward the floor. Behind him: a young woman moves quietly and methodically, picking up her belongings from the shelves one by one — clothes, books, small items. All seen from behind. Neither speaks. Cold blue-gray webtoon palette, wide emotional shot, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Webtoon still-life emotional close-up. A fully packed travel bag placed neatly beside an apartment front door. On the wall shelf beside it: painful empty gaps — a single hair clip, a small photo frame lying face-down, one pastel mug remaining. The outlines of where her things used to be are hauntingly visible. Cold blue-gray webtoon palette, soft gradient shading, 16:9, no faces, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. A Vietnamese student apartment window at night viewed from inside. Rain streaks softly down the glass in diagonal lines. Outside in the wet alley: warm orange-yellow street lights bleed and dissolve in the rain into soft glowing pools on the wet road. Cold blue interior contrasts with warm dissolving lights outside. Atmospheric webtoon panel, no characters, cold-warm color contrast, 16:9, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. Vietnamese student apartment doorway. A young woman pulls her packed bag through the open door, pausing one final time — her head turns slightly back toward the room. In the soft blurred background: a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student remains seated on the bed's edge, seen from behind, perfectly still, making no move to stand, speak, or stop her. Depth-of-field webtoon composition, her sharp in foreground him soft in background, cold palette, 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic sad atmosphere. Wide shot from the apartment doorway looking inward. The room is split: the right half completely emptied — bare wire hangers, vacant shelves, clean empty floor. The left half still holds a young man's belongings. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student sits on the bed in the inhabited half, seen from behind, unmoving. The empty right half feels enormous. Cold blue-gray webtoon palette, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Extreme close-up webtoon panel: two hands holding a smartphone in a dark apartment. Messaging app open on screen — a partially typed message visible. A thumb hovers. Then presses delete. The screen returns to empty white. Only hands and phone visible, surrounding darkness. Cold blue phone screen glow, maximum emotional restraint, 16:9, no face, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. HERO SHOT — maximum emotional weight. A Vietnamese student apartment at night. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student sits on the bare floor, back leaning against the foot of his bed, knees drawn up to his chest, head bowed completely forward — seen entirely from behind. Scattered on the floor: a printed thesis evaluation sheet with a red mark face-up, a smartphone screen glowing with a rejection email. The adjacent bed is completely empty — only the soft indent of a pillow where she used to sleep. The only light in the room: a cold blue-white glow from the street lamp outside streaming through the window, casting long gentle shadows across the floor. This is his birthday. Three losses in one day. Korean webtoon emotional climax panel, deep soft shadows, cold blue-gray palette, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Seamless webtoon split-frame panel. LEFT HALF: warm amber manhwa tones — a Vietnamese student apartment, a 23-year-old Vietnamese male student and a young woman sit close together on a bed seen from behind, shoulders gently touching, warm golden-amber light, soft and comfortable. RIGHT HALF: cold blue-gray manhwa tones — the identical spot, same angle and framing, only the male student remains sitting alone, the space beside him completely and painfully empty. The two halves meet at a soft blurred center divide. 16:9, no faces visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. A small wooden study desk in a Vietnamese student apartment, viewed from a slight angle. Left side: inhabited — textbooks stacked, a small lamp glowing, a used ceramic mug with a tea ring stain. Right side: bare — only faint dust outlines where her things used to be, one empty cold mug sitting alone. Two cups. One side full, one side hollow. Cold blue-gray webtoon still-life, soft gradient lighting, 16:9, no faces, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work, melancholic atmosphere. A Vietnamese student apartment at pre-dawn. The sky through the window a pale cold blue-gray — he never slept. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student slumps at his desk, seen from behind, head resting heavily in one hand. On the desk directly before him: a small single-serving birthday cake in a clear plastic box — one unlit birthday candle on top, still sealed, unopened. No one to share it with. Pale cold webtoon morning light, soft gradient shading, 16:9, no face visible, no text.

Korean manhwa webtoon illustration, soft cel-shaded 2D art, clean line work. Final closing panel. View from outside an open doorway looking into a Vietnamese student apartment. The room divided: right side completely emptied — bare hangers, vacant shelves, clean floor. Left side still inhabited with his belongings. A 23-year-old Vietnamese male student stands at the doorway threshold, seen from behind — one hand resting on the door frame. He does not step in. He does not step back. He stands suspended. The edges of the frame fade softly to black. Cold blue-gray webtoon palette, contemplative wide final panel, 16:9, no face visible, no text.
